content: (The location is now The Shadow Doomstone.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Serana, Leonara Arius, Vale Deer, Cow, chicken) (MJR equipped Summon Serana) (MJR unequipped Unrelenting Force) (MJR cast the spell / consumed Summon Serana) (MJR unequipped Soul Gauge Left-hand) (MJR equipped Soul Gauge Left-hand) (MJR unequipped Summon Serana) (MJR equipped Daedric Wrath) (MJR equipped Unrelenting Force) (MJR unequipped Daedric Wrath)
Imperial Soldier: This Shadow Doomstone gives me the chills, even with the sky so clear this morning.

(*You are observing the following:* In this serene outdoor scene, the viewer stands amidst a lush, autumnal woodland clearing. Tall birch trees with pale, peeling bark and sparse yellowing leaves frame the area, their trunks rising gracefully against a backdrop of distant snow-capped mountains under a clear sky. The ground is carpeted in fallen orange and red leaves, interspersed with patches of vibrant green grass, ferns, and clusters of delicate purple flowers blooming near the bases of the trees. To the right, a sturdy wooden structure with weathered plank walls and a stone foundation sits partially enclosed by a low wooden fence, its thatched roof slightly askew. Nearby, large boulders and smaller rocks dot the terrain, while a sinuous, scaled form—resembling a coiled serpent with reddish-brown hues—lies partially obscured in the leaf litter at the foreground's edge. Overlaid across the lower portion of the view is a subtle, arched interface resembling a compass, marked with intricate knotwork patterns and a faint directional indicator, evoking ancient craftsmanship. At the scene's periphery, small icons and symbols hover faintly:)

(Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Fox, Elk, Cow, chicken, chicken) (Frea equipped Dawnbreaker) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Hands) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Feet) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Necklace) (Frea unequipped Silver Witch Body) (Frea equipped Silver Witch Body) (Frea unequipped Dawnbreaker) (Frea has entered combat with Arch Conjurer) (Frea equipped Ebonyflesh) (Lydia has entered combat with Arch Conjurer) (Serana has entered combat with Arch Conjurer) (MJR dropped/gave Daedric Arrow) (MJR fired an arrow.) (MJR unequipped Daedric Arrow) (Arch Conjurer was killed by the group) (Serana is no longer in combat) (Lydia is no longer in combat) (Frea is no longer in combat) (MJR equipped Daedric Arrow) (The location is now Snow-Shod Farm.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Imperial Soldier, chicken, Frea, chicken, chicken)

Serana: Well, that arch conjurer went down like a bad skooma trip—screaming into the void while we turned him into ectoplasm confetti. Now this farm's got that perfect clear sky mocking us, all starry and innocent, like it wasn't just waiting for us to crash the chicken party. Imperial Soldier: Peaceful night like this at Snow-Shod Farm always sets me on edge—too quiet after scraps like that. Empire patrols keep these roads clear, but you lot stirring up conjurers? That's not helping our shifts. Imperial Soldier 2: Aye, clear skies mean good visibility for ambushes too.

(*You are observing the following:* In this nighttime scene, a starry sky stretches overhead, dotted with countless twinkling stars against a deep indigo backdrop. The landscape is framed by rocky outcrops and clusters of trees with vibrant autumn foliage in shades of yellow and orange, their leaves rustling gently as if caught in a faint breeze. A rustic wooden cabin with a sloped roof and timber walls sits nestled among the terrain, partially obscured by tall ferns and wild grasses that sway in the foreground. A serene body of water gleams faintly in the distance, reflecting hints of the starlight and surrounded by patches of colorful wildflowers—clusters of purple blooms and golden-orange petals dotting the meadow-like ground. Closer to the center, a woman stands poised and alert, her silver hair pulled back into a high ponytail that cascades down her back. She has a fair complexion and sharp, determined features, clad in form-fitting armor that appears crafted from dark leather and metallic accents: a scant, strap-adorned top and bottoms that leave much of her toned midriff and legs exposed, accented by intricate banding around her neck and arms. Sturdy greaves encase her shins, paired with thigh-high boots reinforced with metallic plates.) (Characters nearby (from nearest to furthest): Frea, Lydia, Imperial Soldier, chicken, Cow)
